response:
Sec. 1  
Allergies to peanuts are immune system responses to proteins found in peanuts  
These responses can lead to severe reactions such as anaphylaxis  
Living underwater does not eliminate exposure to peanut proteins  
People with peanut allergies must avoid peanuts regardless of their environment  
Underwater living does not provide a safe environment for those with peanut allergies  

Sec. 2  
The question implies a connection between peanut allergies and the ability to live underwater  
This connection is based on a misunderstanding of allergic reactions  
Allergic reactions are triggered by ingestion or contact with allergens  
Underwater environments do not prevent allergen exposure  
Therefore people with peanut allergies cannot live underwater due to the risk of allergen exposure
